title: Image Upload Window
selectDirectoryHint: Click the button above to select an image folder
noImages: No images found in this directory
dragToUpload: Drag images to target area to upload
name: Name
selectFolderHint: Select a folder to view images
helpDescription: Conveniently upload images to TMDB manually. Open the directory containing downloaded images, pin the window on top, and drag images from the TMDB page to upload — eliminating the hassle of switching between browser download menus and local folders.
